calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Robert Peterson III appearing for co-trustee Frederick Fox. Philip Fox, co-trustee is in court. Philip Fox is willing to pay the appriased value for the coins. Philip Fox will get financial statments from Mr. Peterson who will get them from his client. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR# 1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Continued To Apr-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson (Counsel for Frederick Fox, Trustee); Philip Fox (Beneficiary, Former Trustee); Frederick Fox (Trustee, present in court).

Mr. Peterson addressed several issues including the $10,000 allowance to Philip Fox for attorney's fees, interest on a loan to Philip Fox, procedural issues concerning a distribution to a minor, and the in-kind distribution of silver coins. After rebuttal by Philip Fox, the Court ordered the silver coins to be valued for distribution purposes as of April 3, 2007. The remaining matters were taken under submission and a status hearing was set for April 10, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

Motion For Order And Citation Of Frederick N Fox And Rosemary Stanley To Answer Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Philip J. Fox, petitioner in propria persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE WAS STATED. AFTER HEARING TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner Philip Fox's motion to compel responses to interrogatories is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Continued To Mar-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson (Counsel for Frederick Fox, Co-Trustee); Philip Fox (Co-Trustee).

After some discussion concerning the status of the accounting and pending discovery issues, the court continued the hearing on the Petition to March 13, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: Stella Pantazis, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Jimmy Peralta; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnson.
